pr.title: docs: add .github/copilot-instructions.md for cloud agent onboarding
pr.body:
## Summary

Adds a `.github/copilot-instructions.md` file to onboard the Copilot cloud agent to this repository. This file provides a comprehensive, single-source overview that enables the agent to work efficiently without re-discovering the repo each time.

## What's Included

The instructions cover:

- **Quick Start** — pointers to the existing `docs/codebase/` documentation suite
- **Project Overview** — what the tool is (NBA DFS optimizer for DraftKings, local-only)
- **Architecture** — the sequential file-based pipeline (Engine → Ranker → Exporter → Exposure Report) with a module responsibility table
- **Environment Setup** — `pip install -e .`, `.env` configuration, required environment variables
- **Build and Run** — all commands (CLI, GUI, late swap, standalone modules), plus the explicit note that no linters/tests/build steps exist
- **Coding Conventions** — naming rules, import patterns, error handling style, Config injection pattern
- **Critical Pitfalls** — the 7 most important things to avoid (stale file pickup, dual data loading, cross-module coupling, high-risk files, no tests, GUI headless limitations, Windows multiprocessing)
- **Documentation Updates** — when and how to update docs on code changes

## No Errors Encountered

The repository has no build, lint, or test commands to run. The file is a standalone markdown document with no code changes.
pr.author: Copilot
